title: Real-parameter calibration + first robustness grading
description: Source-mining audit item #1 (Gap-Register 3.1 + Wave 2.5): run every measurement in artifacts/audits/map-real-parameter-calibration.md that current event/trace/replay data supports, honestly marking unsupported ones; apply artifacts/audits/map-sensitivity-robustness-method.md to grade standing 6.13 conclusions robust/conditional/unsupported. Work packet: MAP_System/inbox/helpers/calibration-run-packet.md.
acceptance_criteria: Every measurement in the calibration plan is either run with real repo data or explicitly marked unsupported with the missing data named; no simulated substitutes.
Grading report labels each standing conclusion robust/conditional/unsupported with evidence.
Read-only against MAP state; only the two artifacts written.
